faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to all your questions
faq.question1: How do I register for a course?
faq.answer1: Simply choose your desired course, click 'Register Now', fill in your information and complete payment. You'll receive a confirmation email and can start learning immediately.
faq.answer2: We have both free and paid courses. The Basic plan is completely free with 5 courses. Pro and Premium plans are paid but offer more features and courses.
faq.answer3: Yes, after completing the course and passing the final exam, you'll receive a digital certificate. Certificates can be shared on LinkedIn and other platforms.
faq.question4: How long does it take to complete a course?
faq.answer4: Completion time depends on the course and your learning pace. On average, a course takes 4-8 weeks if you dedicate 3-5 hours/week. You can learn at your own pace.
